_meta.description: Audio clip definitions for Thompson Education Platform. Source of truth for generate-audio.js and Notion Audio Clip Queue.

clips.text: [excited] You spelled JJ!!! Great job, girl!
[excited] JJ, you spelled KINDLE!!! That's AMAZING!
[encouraging] Good try, JJ! One more time!
[excited] JJ, pick a game to play!
[excited] Let's play Find the Letter, JJ!
[excited] JJ, let's play the Sound Game!
[curious] JJ, how many do you see?
[happy] Bye bye JJ! See you next time!
[excited] Science loaded up... LET'S GET IT!
[excited] No WAY you just did that!!! LET'S GO!!!
[excited] Episode ARCHIVED... that was FIRE, Buggsy!!!
[encouraging] Read the passage, Buggsy... take your time.
[encouraging] Find your evidence... what did the text say?
[excited] Ready to drop this in the archives?!
